title: SOPHIAS face bounding-box schema
description: Schema for frame-level facial bounding-box coordinates extracted from a video stream during the SOPHIAS face-processing pipeline. This schema can be used for bounding boxes extracted from the presenter-view webcam video or from the eye-tracker scene video.

Frame.description: Sequential frame index in the processed video stream.

X1.description: Horizontal coordinate of the upper-left corner of the detected face bounding box.

Y1.description: Vertical coordinate of the upper-left corner of the detected face bounding box.

X2.description: Horizontal coordinate of the lower-right corner of the detected face bounding box.

Y2.description: Vertical coordinate of the lower-right corner of the detected face bounding box.
